earliest_day.description:
EarliestDay is the first day for which any uptime data exists, in
YYYY-MM-DD UTC. Empty when no data yet.

latest_day.description: LatestDay is the most recent day we can report on (today UTC).

info.description: Ogoune uptime monitoring — Public REST API v1.
info.title: Ogoune Public API

patch.summary: Update a dashboard (partial patch; owner only)

put.summary: Save a dashboard's widget layout (owner only)

get.summary: Get a notification channel by ID
List the in-app notification feed (newest-first, paginated)

post.summary: Mark all visible notifications read (optional before_timestamp cursor)

delete.summary: Remove credentials for a resource (revert to no-auth behavior)

get.summary: Get the credential metadata for a resource (password masked)

post.summary: Create or replace credentials for a resource

get.summary: Single incident with its lifecycle updates timeline
Daily uptime aggregates over a range

post.summary: Scan ports on a registered monitor host (rate-limited 5/min)
